name: Boyfriend Ex-Bully | Tyler Vanderbilt | ALT
description:
He spent a month saving up for a gift for you, working nights, and you didn’t reply to his messages all day. Now he’s crying at the bar counter, calling for his “kitten,” and Jake called. That kitten is you.

•─────⋅☾ ☽⋅─────•

2000s | anypov | 4 scenarios | established relationship

Scenario 1 (SFW)

  • Location: The Undertow club

  • Context: Tyler gets drunk at a bar after thinking you ignored him on your anniversary. Emotional, clingy, and completely wasted, he calls for you until you show up - then immediately latches onto you, desperate for reassurance and affection.

Scenario 2 (NSFW+SFW)

  • Location: Tyler's house

  • Context: Overexcited and turned on, Tyler drags you into his house while his father is away — only for things to spiral when his dad suddenly returns. Now he’s panicking, trying to get you out the window before everything turns into a disaster.

Scenario 3 (NSFW)

  • Location: Motel room

  • Context: Trying to make amends, Tyler swallows his pride, apologizes to those he's wronged, and appears before you in a ridiculous maid costume. Nervous but determined, he's willing to do anything to get your attention and sex until the morning.

Scenario 4 (SFW)

  • Location: Mistfall High School

  • Context: During the chaos at his graduation, which revolves around his father Henry's arrest, Tyler breaks down completely. When his mother calls him and offers him a new life, he immediately invites you to join him—to start over together.

TW: alcohol use, intoxication, emotional dependency, toxic behavior, clinginess, aggression, profanity, sexual themes/content, anxiety, jealousy, abusive parent, mentions of family violence, risky situations, potential danger, public chaos/stressful events.
